creator: freebsd@amc-os.com
text:
Hi

        0x0090:  6772 6f75 702d 6578 6368 616e 6765 2d73  group-exchange-s

I will try to add some debug, don't hesitate to tell me if you have other 
ideas so i can do more tests.
Thanks,

Aurélien
